info.title: Ex Libris APIs
info.description: For more information on how to use these APIs, including how to create an API key required for authentication, see [Alma REST APIs](https://developers.exlibrisgroup.com/alma/apis).

externalDocs.description: Detailed documentation on these APIs at the Ex Libris Developer Network.

get.description: This API returns a list of Users, sorted by last name.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Limits the number of results. Optional. Valid values are 0-100. Default value: 10.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Offset of the results returned. Optional. Default value: 0, which means that the first results will be returned.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Search query. Optional. Searching for words from: primary_id, first_name, last_name, middle_name, email, phone_number, job_category, identifiers, birth_date, user_group, campus_code, block_type, id_type, note_text, note_type, statistic_category, fines_fees_sum, general_info (keywords from all fields except emails, birth_date and identifiers) and ALL (words from all fields but without support for the AND operator). Example (note the tilde between the code and text): q=last_name~Smith (see [Brief Search](https://developers.exlibrisgroup.com/blog/How-we-re-building-APIs-at-Ex-Libris#BriefSearch))

parameters.name: order_by
parameters.description: A few sort options are available: last_name, first_name and primary_id. One sort option may be used at a time. A secondary sort key, primary_id, is added if last_name or first_name is the primary sort. Default sorting is by all three in the following order: last_name, first_name, primary_id. If the query option is used, the result will not sort by primary_id.

parameters.name: source_institution_code
parameters.description: The code of the source institution from which the user was linked. Optional

parameters.name: source_user_id
parameters.description: The ID of the user in the source institution. Optional.

parameters.name: expand
parameters.description: This parameter allows for expanding all user information.  To have all the user fields in the output use expand=full.

parameters.name: modify_date_from
parameters.description: Filter users modified after the given date. Optional. This parameter is mutually exclusive with the 'q' parameter - only one of them may be used in a request. If both are provided, the request will be rejected. The expected date format is yyyy-MM-dd.

200.description: OK - This method returns an object based on rest_users.xsd. See [here](/alma/apis/docs/xsd/rest_users.xsd)

400.description:
Bad Request

402119 - 'General error.'

401651 - 'Source institution not valid or not part of fulfillment network.'

401861 - 'Source institution user with given identifier not found.'

4019990 - 'Local copied user information not found.'

60224 - 'Organization institution not found.'

60225 - 'Fulfillment network not found.'

60226 - 'Fulfillment network copied user not found.'

post.description: This Web service creates a new user.

parameters.name: social_authentication
parameters.description: When customer parameter social_authentication='True': Send social authentication email to patron. Default value: False.

parameters.name: send_pin_number_letter
parameters.description: The email notification for PIN setting change will be sent

parameters.name: source_institution_code
parameters.description: The code of the source institution to which the user should be linked. Optional

parameters.name: source_user_id
parameters.description: The ID of the user in the source institution. Optional.

parameters.name: registration_rules
parameters.description: Apply registration rules in the context of the library. True or false. Optional.

parameters.name: library
parameters.description: The code of the library. For use with registration rules. Optional.

requestBody.description: This method takes a User object. See [here](/alma/apis/docs/xsd/rest_user.xsd?tags=POST)

200.description: OK - This method returns an object based on rest_user.xsd. See [here](/alma/apis/docs/xsd/rest_user.xsd)

400.description:
Bad Request

401676 - 'No valid XML was given.'

401851 - 'User with identifier  of type Y already exists.'

401664 - 'Mandatory field is missing: X'

401852 - 'Given user group is not legal.'

401853 - 'External Id must be empty for internal user.'

401854 - 'External Id must be given for external user.'

401855 - 'The account type 'Internal with external authentication' is currently not supported.'

500038 - 'New password must be at least 8 characters long and must not include the user-name or any commonly used password.'

401857 - 'The given user account type is illegal (must be INTERNAL/EXTERNAL).'

401658 - 'General Error - Failed to create new user'

401863 - 'Given X type (Y) is not supported for given user record type (Z).'

401864 - 'Given X type (Y) is invalid.'

401651 - 'Source institution not valid or not part of fulfillment network.'

60224 - 'Organization institution not found.'

60225 - 'Fulfillment network not found.'

60226 - 'Fulfillment network copied user not found.'

60227 - 'Linked account for user already exists.'

60228 - 'Failed to create linked user account.'

60231 - 'Failed to link user due to identifier issues.'

60232 - 'Failed to link user due to user group empty.'

200.description: OK - This method returns an object based on rest_user.xsd. See [here](/alma/apis/docs/xsd/rest_user.xsd)

Bad Request

200.description: OK

400.description: Bad Request

200.description: OK

get.description: This Web service retrieves a list of login events.

parameters.name: login_date_from
parameters.description: Retrieve events from this Date (YYYY-MM-DD). Optional.

parameters.name: login_date_to
parameters.description: Retrieve events until this Date, included (YYYY-MM-DD). Optional.

parameters.name: successful
parameters.description: Filters successful attempts or failed login attempts.Optional values: all, true and failed-login-attempts. optional. By default this is true.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Limits the number of results. Optional. Valid values are 0-100. Default value: 10.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Offset of the results returned. Optional.Default value: 0, which means that the first results will be returned.

200.description: OK - This method returns an object based on rest_login_events.xsd. See [here](/alma/apis/docs/xsd/rest_login_events.xsd)

400.description: Bad Request

delete.description: This Web service deletes a specific user.

parameters.name: user_id
parameters.description: A unique identifier for the user

parameters.name: user_id_type
parameters.description: The type of identifier that is being searched. Optional. If this is not provided, all unique identifier types are used. The values that can be used are any of the values in the User Identifier Type code table.

400.description:
Bad Request

401890 - 'User with identifier X of type Y was not found.'

401850 - 'Failed to delete user with identifier X of type Y.'

get.description:
This Web service returns a specific user's details.



Note: When the users are managed in the Network Zone, getting a user from a local institution is equivalent to localizing the record based on the NZ.

parameters.name: user_id
parameters.description: A unique identifier for the user

parameters.name: user_id_type
parameters.description: The type of identifier that is being searched. Optional. If this is not provided, all unique identifier types are used. The values that can be used are any of the values in the User Identifier Type code table. The value may also be linking_id.  To search for users which have linked accounts in other institutions according to the linking_id use user_id_type=linking_id.

parameters.name: view
parameters.description: Special view of User object. Optional. Possible values: full - full User object will be returned. brief - only user's core information, emails, identifiers and statistics are returned. By default, the full User object will be returned.

parameters.name: expand
parameters.description: This parameter allows for expanding on some user information. Three options are available: loans-Include the total number of loans; requests-Include the total number of requests; fees-Include the balance of fees. To have more than one option, use a comma separator.

parameters.name: source_institution_code
parameters.description: The source institution Code. Optional. When used the user_id is used to locate a copied user (linked account) based on source_link_id.

200.description: OK - This method returns an object based on rest_user.xsd. See [here](/alma/apis/docs/xsd/rest_user.xsd)

400.description:
Bad Request

401890 - 'User with identifier X of type Y was not found.'

401861 - 'User with identifier X was not found.'

4019990 - 'User with source identifier X of institution Y was not found.'

4019998 - 'User with linking ID not found.'

60101 - 'General Error: An error has occurred while processing the request.'

post.description:
This Web service runs a user authentication process or refreshes a linked user in Alma. 

Refresh operation requires a user at the local institution that is linked to a user at another institution.

Authentication operation requires a password which may be entered as a parameter or with the header: Exl-User-Pw

Authentication is meant for internal users that have passwords in the Ex Libris Identity Service.

Successful authentication or refresh will result with an HTTP 204 (success - no content) response.

Note: Unlike other POST APIs, the authentication operation is allowed also for API-keys which are configured to allow read-only access, as this API does not alter the data.

parameters.name: user_id
parameters.description: A unique identifier for the user

parameters.name: user_id_type
parameters.description: The type of identifier that is being searched. Optional. If this is not provided, all unique identifier types are used. The values that can be used are any of the values in the User Identifier Type code table.

parameters.name: op
parameters.description: The operation to be performed on the user. Mandatory. Currently op=auth or op=refresh are supported.  The default is auth.

parameters.name: password
parameters.description: The user's password. Relevant for op=auth. Alternatively the password can be sent, URL-encoded, in the header named Exl-User-Pw.

200.description: OK

400.description:
Bad Request

401866 - 'User authentication failed'

401890 - 'User was not found.'

401861 - 'Refresh user with given identifier not found.'

60229 - 'Failed to find linked account for user.'

60226 - 'Fulfillment network copied user not found.'

60230 - 'Failed to refresh linked user.'

put.description:
This Web service updates a specific user's details. 



The update is done in a 'Swap All' mode: existing fields' information will be replaced with the incoming information. Incoming lists will replace existing lists. 

Exception for this are the following fields: 

roles - if the incoming list does not contain roles, existing roles will be kept.  

External users: Preferred first name, Preferred middle name, Preferred last name, User group, Job category, PIN number, User language, Resource sharing libraries, Campus code and User title: these fields will not be replaced if updated manually (or if empty in the incoming user record), unless 'override' parameter is sent with the field's name.

parameters.name: user_id
parameters.description: A unique identifier for the user

parameters.name: user_id_type
parameters.description: The type of identifier that is being searched. Optional. If this is not provided, all unique identifier types are used. The values that can be used are any of the values in the User Identifier Type code table.

parameters.name: override
parameters.description:
The following fields of the user object are not replaced if they were updated manually: 

user_group, job_category, pin_number, preferred_language, campus_code, rs_libraries, user_title, library_notices, pref_first_name, pref_middle_name, pref_last_name, cataloger_level. 

To update these fields, specify the fields you want to replace in this parameter. 

For example override=user_group,job_category. Default is empty.

parameters.name: send_pin_number_letter
parameters.description: The email notification for PIN setting change will be sent

parameters.name: recalculate_roles
parameters.description: Recalculate the roles based on role assignment rules.

parameters.name: registration_rules
parameters.description: Apply registration rules in the context of the library. True or false. Optional.

parameters.name: library
parameters.description: The code of the library. For use with registration rules. Optional.

requestBody.description: This method takes a User object. See [here](/alma/apis/docs/xsd/rest_user.xsd?tags=PUT)

200.description: OK - This method returns an object based on rest_user.xsd. See [here](/alma/apis/docs/xsd/rest_user.xsd)

400.description:
Bad Request

401890 - 'User with identifier X of type Y was not found.'

401859 - 'Action currently not supported.'

401676 - 'No valid XML was given.'

401858 - 'The external id in DB does not fit the given value in xml - external id cannot be updated.'

401855 - 'The account type 'Internal with external authentication' is currently not supported.'

500038 - 'New password must be at least 8 characters long and must not include the user-name or any commonly used password.'

401860 - 'Failed to update user.'

401652 - 'General Error: An error has occurred while processing the request.'

401863 - 'Given X type (Y) is not supported for given user record type (Z).'

401864 - 'Given X type (Y) is invalid.'

post.description: This API creates a user's attachment.

parameters.name: user_id
parameters.description: A unique identifier for the user.

parameters.name: user_id_type
parameters.description: The type of identifier that is being searched. Optional. If this is not provided, all unique identifier types are used. The values that can be used are any of the values in the User Identifier Type code table.

requestBody.description: The Attachment info to create.  See [here](/alma/apis/docs/xsd/rest_attachment.xsd?tags=POST)

200.description: OK - This method returns an object based on rest_attachment.xsd. See [here](/alma/apis/docs/xsd/rest_attachment.xsd)

400.description:
Bad Request

60100 - 'The parameter X must be a number greater than zero.'

60322 - 'Attachment content could not be processed.'

get.description: This API returns a users attachment.

parameters.name: user_id
parameters.description: A unique identifier for the user.

parameters.name: attachment_id
parameters.description: The Attachment id.

parameters.name: user_id_type
parameters.description: The type of identifier that is being searched. Optional. If this is not provided, all unique identifier types are used. The values that can be used are any of the values in the User Identifier Type code table.

parameters.name: expand
parameters.description: The expand parameter. Optional. Possible values: 'content' or 'content_no_encoding'.

200.description: OK - This method returns an object based on rest_attachment.xsd. See [here](/alma/apis/docs/xsd/rest_attachment.xsd)

400.description:
Bad Request

60100 - 'The parameter X must be a number greater than zero.'

60321 - 'Attachment X not found.'

60322 - 'Attachment content could not be processed.'

get.description: This Web service retrieves the user deposits for a particular user id

parameters.name: user_id
parameters.description: A unique identifier for the user

parameters.name: user_id_type
parameters.description: The type of identifier that is being searched. Optional. If this is not provided, all unique identifier types are used. The values that can be used are any of the values in the User Identifier Type code table.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: filter deposits by status

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Limits the number of results. Optional. Valid values are 0-100. Default value: 10.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Offset of the results returned. Optional. Default value: 0, which means that the first results will be returned.

parameters.name: order_by
parameters.description: Few sort options are available: name, modification_date. One sort option may be used at a time. Default sorting is by name

parameters.name: direction
parameters.description: Sorting direction: ASC/DESC. Default: ASC.

200.description: OK - This method returns an object based on rest_user_deposits.xsd. See [here](/alma/apis/docs/xsd/rest_user_deposits.xsd)

400.description:
Bad Request

402238 - 'Failed to get deposits.'

post.description: This API performs creation of a deposit object. Currently supported: submitting deposit, submitting deposit as a draft.

parameters.name: user_id
parameters.description: A unique identifier for the user

parameters.name: user_id_type
parameters.description: The type of identifier that is being searched. Optional. If this is not provided, all unique identifier types are used. The values that can be used are any of the values in the User Identifier Type code table.

parameters.name: draft
parameters.description: Boolean flag for indicating whether submit as draft.

requestBody.description: This method takes a Deposit object. See [here](/alma/apis/docs/xsd/rest_user_deposit.xsd?tags=POST)

200.description: OK - This method returns an object based on rest_user_deposit.xsd. See [here](/alma/apis/docs/xsd/rest_user_deposit.xsd)

400.description:
Bad Request

401652 - 'General Error - An error has occurred while creating the deposit.'

402205 - 'Input parameter X (Y) is not numeric.'

401666 - 'X parameter is not valid.'

parameters.name: op

get.description: This API returns a user's fines and fees.

parameters.name: user_id
parameters.description: A unique identifier for the user

parameters.name: user_id_type
parameters.description: The type of identifier that is being searched. Optional. If this is not provided, all unique identifier types are used. The values that can be used are any of the values in the User Identifier Type code table.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Return fees of this status only. Optional. If this is not provided, all active fees will be returned. The values that can be used are {ACTIVE|INDISPUTE|EXPORTED|CLOSED}.

200.description: OK - This method returns an object based on rest_fees.xsd. See [here](/alma/apis/docs/xsd/rest_fees.xsd)

400.description:
Bad Request

402119 - 'General error.'

401651 - 'Identifier not found.'

401666 - 'Parameter is not valid.'

60258 - 'The API Restricted profile is not valid.'

200.description: OK - This method returns an object based on rest_fee.xsd. See [here](/alma/apis/docs/xsd/rest_fee.xsd)

Bad Request

401861 - 'User with identifier X was not found.'

4019991 - 'User fine/fee type is required.'

4019992 - 'User fine/fee type invalid entry.'

4019994 - 'User fine/fee original amount is required.'

4019993 - 'User item barcode invalid entry.'

4019996 - 'User fine/fee owner is required.'

4019999 - 'User fine/fee owner must be an institution.'

4019997 - 'User fine/fee owner must be a library and not institution.'

402119 - 'General error.'

60340 - 'The request is API Restricted by library.'

60258 - 'The API Restricted profile is not valid.'

post.description: This API posts a payment against a specific user's fines and fees as a whole.

parameters.name: user_id
parameters.description: A unique identifier for the user

parameters.name: user_id_type
parameters.description: The type of identifier that is being searched. Optional. If this is not provided, all unique identifier types are used. The values that can be used are any of the values in the User Identifier Type code table.

parameters.name: op
parameters.description: The operation to be performed on the user's specified fee. Mandatory. Currently only op=pay is supported

parameters.name: amount
parameters.description: The amount of the payment to be made on the user's specified fees. To pay the entire balance use amount=ALL

parameters.name: method
parameters.description: The Payment method. Relevant and mandatory if op=pay. Options are CREDIT_CARD, ONLINE, or CASH

parameters.name: comment
parameters.description: A note that can be attached to the payment action. Optional.

parameters.name: external_transaction_id
parameters.description: An external payment system transaction ID. Optional.

200.description: OK - This method returns an object based on rest_fees.xsd. See [here](/alma/apis/docs/xsd/rest_fees.xsd)

400.description:
Bad Request

402119 - 'General error.'

401651 - 'Identifier not found.'

401666 - 'Parameter is not valid.'

60340 - 'The request is API Restricted by library.'

60258 - 'The API Restricted profile is not valid.'

get.description: This API returns a specific fine or fee for a user.

parameters.name: user_id
parameters.description: A unique identifier for the user

parameters.name: fee_id
parameters.description: The fine/fee identifier

parameters.name: user_id_type
parameters.description: The type of identifier that is being searched. Optional. If this is not provided, all unique identifier types are used. The values that can be used are any of the values in the User Identifier Type code table.

200.description: OK - This method returns an object based on rest_fee.xsd. See [here](/alma/apis/docs/xsd/rest_fee.xsd)

400.description:
Bad Request

402119 - 'General error.'

401665 - 'Fine not found.'

401651 - 'Identifier not found.'

401666 - 'Parameter is not valid.'

60340 - 'The request is API Restricted by library.'

60258 - 'The API Restricted profile is not valid.'

post.description: This API applies the specified operation to a specific fine/fee.

parameters.name: user_id
parameters.description: A unique identifier for the user

parameters.name: fee_id
parameters.description: The fine/fee identifier

parameters.name: user_id_type
parameters.description: The type of identifier that is being searched. Optional. If this is not provided, all unique identifier types are used. The values that can be used are any of the values in UserIdentifierTypes code table.

parameters.name: op
parameters.description: The operation to be performed on the user's specified fee. Mandatory. Options are pay, waive, dispute or restore

parameters.name: amount
parameters.description: The amount of the payment to be made on the user's specified fees. Relevant for op=pay,waive

parameters.name: method
parameters.description: The Payment method. Relevant and mandatory if op=pay. Options are CREDIT_CARD, ONLINE, or CASH

parameters.name: reason
parameters.description: The reason for waiving the fine/fee. Relevant and mandatory for op=waive. The value should be one of the codes from the FineFeeTransactionReason code table.

parameters.name: comment
parameters.description: A note that can be attached to the action. Optional.

parameters.name: external_transaction_id
parameters.description: An external payment system transaction ID. Relevant for op=pay

200.description: OK - This method returns an object based on rest_fee.xsd. See [here](/alma/apis/docs/xsd/rest_fee.xsd)

400.description:
Bad Request

402119 - 'General error.'

401665 - 'Fine not found.'

401651 - 'Identifier not found.'

401666 - 'Parameter is not valid.'

60340 - 'The fee is API Restricted by library.'

60258 - 'The API Restricted profile is not valid.'

get.description: This Web service retrieves a list of active loans for a user.

parameters.name: user_id
parameters.description: A unique identifier for the user

parameters.name: user_id_type
parameters.description: The type of identifier that is being searched. Optional. If this is not provided, all unique identifier types are used. The values that can be used are any of the values in the User Identifier Type code table.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Limits the number of results. Optional. Valid values are 0-100. Default value: 10.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Offset of the results returned. Optional. Default value: 0, which means that the first results will be returned.

parameters.name: order_by
parameters.description: A few sort options are available (only one can be sent): loan_date, due_date, barcode, title, author and return_date (relevant only for historical loans). A secondary sort key, id, is added to the single sort option chosen. Default sorting is by id.

parameters.name: direction
parameters.description: Sorting direction: ASC/DESC. Default: ASC.

parameters.name: expand
parameters.description: Comma separated list of values for expansion of results. Possible values: 'renewable'

parameters.name: loan_status
parameters.description: Active or Completeloan status. Default: Active. The Complete loan status is only relevant if historic loans haven't been anonymized.

200.description: OK - This method returns an object based on rest_item_loans.xsd. See [here](/alma/apis/docs/xsd/rest_item_loans.xsd)

400.description:
Bad Request

401861 - 'User with identifier X was not found.'

401890 - 'User with identifier X of type Y was not found.'

401652 - 'General Error: An error has occurred while processing the request.'

60258 - 'The API Restricted profile is not valid.'

post.description: This Web service loans an item to a user. The loan will be created according to the library's policy.

parameters.name: user_id
parameters.description: A unique identifier for the user

parameters.name: item_pid
parameters.description: The Item ID. This parameter or the item_barcode parameter must be supplied.

parameters.name: user_id_type
parameters.description: The type of identifier that is being searched. Optional. If this is not provided, all unique identifier types are used. The values that can be used are any of the values in the User Identifier Type code table.

parameters.name: item_barcode
parameters.description: The Item barcode. This parameter or the item_pid parameter must be supplied.

parameters.name: generate_linked_user
parameters.description: Boolean flag to indicate whether to search the user in the network and create a linked user. This is only supported for networks that have fully unique patron identifiers. To enable this parameter, please contact Ex Libris customer support.

requestBody.description: This method takes a Loan object. See [here](/alma/apis/docs/xsd/rest_item_loan.xsd?tags=POST)

200.description: OK - This method returns an object based on rest_item_loan.xsd. See [here](/alma/apis/docs/xsd/rest_item_loan.xsd)

400.description:
Bad Request

401890 - 'User with identifier X of type Y was not found.'

401153 - 'Item cannot be loaned from this circulation desk.'

401651 - 'Item is not loanable.'

401672 - 'PID field is empty.'

401652 - 'General Error: An error has occurred while processing the request.'

60340 - 'The loan is API Restricted by library.'

60258 - 'The API Restricted profile is not valid.'

post.description: This Web service renews a loan.

parameters.name: user_id
parameters.description: A unique identifier for the user

parameters.name: loan_id
parameters.description: A unique identifier for the loan

parameters.name: user_id_type
parameters.description: The type of identifier that is being searched. Optional. If this is not provided, all unique identifier types are used. The values that can be used are any of the values in the User Identifier Type code table.

parameters.name: op
parameters.description: Operation. Currently only op=renew is supported

200.description: OK - This method returns an object based on rest_item_loan.xsd. See [here](/alma/apis/docs/xsd/rest_item_loan.xsd)

400.description:
Bad Request

401823 - 'Loan ID XXX does not exist.'

401822 - 'Cannot renew loan: Loan ID XXX.'

60340 - 'The loan is API Restricted by library.'

parameters.name: notify_user
parameters.description: Boolean flag for notifying the borrower of changes in loan due date. Defaults to 'false'.

get.description: This Web service returns a specific user's full details, including all loans, requets etc.This API is intended to be used to comply with GDPR data portability.

parameters.name: user_id
parameters.description: A unique identifier for the user

parameters.name: user_id_type
parameters.description: The type of identifier that is being searched. Optional. If this is not provided, all unique identifier types are used. The values that can be used are any of the values in the User Identifier Type code table. The value may also be linking_id.  To search for users which have linked accounts in other institutions according to the linking_id use user_id_type=linking_id.

200.description: OK - This method returns an object based on rest_user_personal.xsd. See [here](/alma/apis/docs/xsd/rest_user_personal.xsd)

400.description:
Bad Request

401890 - 'User with identifier X of type Y was not found.'

401861 - 'User with identifier X was not found.'

4019990 - 'User with source identifier X of institution Y was not found.'

4019998 - 'User with linking ID not found.'

60101 - 'General Error: An error has occurred while processing the request.'

401861 - 'The user ID is not valid.'

401890 - 'The user can not be found using this identifier.'

60349 - 'The user data could not be added.'

get.description: This Web service retrieves a user's purchase requests.

parameters.name: user_id
parameters.description: A unique identifier for the user

parameters.name: user_id_type
parameters.description: The type of identifier that is being searched. Optional. If this is not provided, all unique identifier types are used. The values that can be used are any of the values in the User Identifier Type code table.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Limits the number of results. Optional. Valid values are 0-100. Default value: 10.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Offset of the results returned. Optional.Default value: 0, which means that the first results will be returned.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: For filtering based on the purchase request's status. Optional. Possible values:  INREVIEW, APPROVED, REJECTED, DEFERRED. Default is no status.

200.description: OK - This method returns an object based on rest_purchase_requests.xsd. See [here](/alma/apis/docs/xsd/rest_purchase_requests.xsd)

400.description:
Bad Request

401890 - 'User with identifier X of type Y was not found.'

401652 - 'General Error: An error has occurred while processing the request.'

60275 - 'Purchase request status is not valid.'

get.description: This Web service returns list of requests for a specific user.

parameters.name: user_id
parameters.description: A unique identifier for the user

parameters.name: request_type
parameters.description: Filter results by request type. Optional. Possible values: HOLD, DIGITIZATION, BOOKING. If not supplied, all request types will be returned.

parameters.name: user_id_type
parameters.description: The type of identifier that is being searched. Optional. If this is not provided, all unique identifier types are used. The values that can be used are any of the values in the User Identifier Type code table.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Limits the number of results. Optional. Valid values are 0-100. Default value: 10.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Offset of the results returned. Optional.Default value: 0, which means that the first results will be returned.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Active or History request status. Default is active. The 'history' option is only available if the 'should_anonymize_requests' customer parameter is set to 'false' at the time the request was completed.

200.description: OK - This method returns an object based on rest_user_requests.xsd. See [here](/alma/apis/docs/xsd/rest_user_requests.xsd)

400.description:
Bad Request

401890 - 'User with identifier X of type Y was not found.'

401652 - 'General Error - An error has occurred while processing the request.'

60258 - 'The API Restricted profile is not valid.'

post.description: This Web service creates a user's request for a library resource. The request can be for a physical item (request types: hold, booking), or a request for digitizing a file (request type: digitization). The request can be placed on title level or on  item level.

parameters.name: user_id
parameters.description: A unique identifier for the user

parameters.name: user_id_type
parameters.description: The type of identifier that is being searched.  Optional. If this is not provided, all unique identifier types are used. The values that can be used are any of the values in the User Identifier Type code table.

parameters.name: mms_id
parameters.description: The requested title. This parameter is mandatory if the request is in title level.

parameters.name: item_pid
parameters.description: The requested item ID. This parameter is mandatory if the request is in item level.

parameters.name: allow_same_request
parameters.description: Allow placing requests for items of the same title by the same user. Optional. Default and recommended: false

requestBody.description: This method takes a Request object. See [here](/alma/apis/docs/xsd/rest_user_request.xsd?tags=POST)

200.description: OK - This method returns an object based on rest_user_request.xsd. See [here](/alma/apis/docs/xsd/rest_user_request.xsd)

400.description:
Bad Request

401890 - 'User with identifier X of type Y was not found.'

401129 - 'No items can fulfill the submitted request.'

401895 - 'Pickup circulation desk with code X and library code Y was not found.'

401136 - 'Failed to save the request: Patron has active request for selected item.'

60308 - 'Delivery to personal address is not supported.'

60309 - 'User does not have address for personal delivery.'

60310 - 'Delivery is not supported for this type of personal address.'

60324 - 'Fulfillment network is not configured.'

60325 - 'Fulfillment network institution is not valid.'

60326 - 'Fulfillment network pickup library or pickup circulation desk is not valid.'

60327 - 'Fulfillment network pickup library or pickup circulation desk is required.'

401684 - 'Search for request physical item failed.'

60328 - 'Item for request was not found.'

60330 - 'Invalid partial digitization volume or issue.'

60331 - 'Failed to create request.'

401652 - 'General Error: An error has occurred while processing the request.'

60340 - 'The request is API Restricted by library.'

60258 - 'The API Restricted profile is not valid.'

delete.description: This Web service cancels a specific user request.

parameters.description: A unique identifier for the user

parameters.name: request_id
parameters.description: A unique identifier of the request that should be canceled.

parameters.name: reason
parameters.description: Code of the cancel reason. Must be a value from the code table 'RequestCancellationReasons'

parameters.name: note

parameters.name: notify_user
parameters.description: Boolean flag for notifying the requester of the cancellation (when relevant). Defaults to 'true'.

get.description: This Web service returns list of leganto notifications for a specific user.

parameters.name: user_name
parameters.description: The user_name of the user

parameters.name: notificationType
parameters.description: Filter results by notification type. Optional. Possible values are listed in code_table_SystemEventTypes

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Limits the number of results. Optional. Valid values are 0-100. Default value: 10

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: From this Date (YYYY-MM-DD). Optional. Defaults to today.

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: To this date (YYYY-MM-DD). Optional. Defaults to the From Date plus one week.

parameters.name: unread
parameters.description: Boolean flag for indicating whether to bring the notifications by to date or leganto last notification viewd date . Optional .

200.description: OK - This method returns an object based on rest_leganto_notifications.xsd. See [here](/alma/apis/docs/xsd/rest_leganto_notifications.xsd)

400.description: Bad Request

ApiKeyAuth.description: API key used to authorize requests. Learn about how to create API keys at [Alma REST APIs](https://developers.exlibrisgroup.com/alma/apis/#defining)
ApiKeyAuth.name: apikey

remaining.description: The number of remaining calls according to the [Governance Threshold](https://developers.exlibrisgroup.com/alma/apis/#threshold)
